title: Discover the Vibrant Colors of Socotra Island

scenes.text: A place where plants look like they've landed from another planet.
This is Socotra Island, located off the coast of Yemen.
Socotra is home to over a third of its plant species found nowhere else on Earth.
Discover the iconic Dragon's Blood tree, known for its red sap.
scenes.query: Socotra Island socotra dragon's blood tree
scenes.label: DRAGON'S BLOOD TREE

scenes.text: Follow to see the world's hidden places.

description: 📍 Socotra Island, Yemen - Yemen. An island with extraordinary plant life that looks from another world. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
